feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: He has done it again, lads. That was Gaben intent from the get-go. Valve wanted …

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8354 Treason Day Edition Previous Thread: >>83853880 F-l…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8354 Treason Day Edition Previous Thread: >>83853880 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profil

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Prediction: much of old YouTube will be deleted in time
entry.content: Archive those classics sooner rather than later assuming they haven't been deleted already YouTube will inevitably begin pruning "useless" content on their platform ie. old videos with less than N number of views or entire accounts that haven't logged-in in N years (with the exception of accounts clearly tied to business or gov't, maybe this is the caveat that sinks the whole theory)

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Please help I'm losing it
entry.content: I've got a 2016 ram 1500 5.7l v8, just got it knowing about the misfire. (Cylinder 6). It was a dead miss at all times, swapped plugs and coils, no difference. Pulled the rocker cover, found the intake valve barely moving. Sure enough it needed lifters and cams (intake lobe for cylinder 6 was completely worn off) I replaced the camshaft, lifters, and mds solenoids (even pulled out the magnets underneath them to clean off the metal shavings) and I still have a misfire on cylinder 6 at idle. I pul

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Should this be legal? It's impossible for them to consent to eating candy becaus…
entry.content: Should this be legal? It's impossible for them to consent to eating candy because their brains aren't fully developed and so they cannot comprehend the wider effects of eating candy, many of which are long-term. They rely on adults to provide it for them, so there's obviously a power imbalance there.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2941
entry.content: >Pearl Harbor’s Revenge Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83862059 >Scripts to check image metada

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I want my 26 hours back.What a shitty sequel. The first game is half as short, i…
entry.content: I want my 26 hours back.What a shitty sequel. The first game is half as short, it's simple, sweet novelty fun. The second game barely improves over the 1st game in gameplay department so ends up being too long for how shallow the gameplay mechanics are.

Their art/music/architecture is clearly the most sophisticated too. Does this feeling exist in your country?

entry.title: /b/ Random: Ten Commandments 1. I am the Lord your God; you shall not have strange gods befo…
entry.content: Ten Commandments 1. I am the Lord your God; you shall not have strange gods before me. 2. You shall not take the name of the Lord your God in vain. 3. Remember to keep holy the Lord's Day. 4. Honor your father and your mother. 5. You shall not kill. 6. You shall not commit adultery. 7. You shall not steal. 8. You shall not bear false witness against your neighbor. 9. You shall not covet your neighbor's wife. 10. You shall not covet your neighbor's goods. Beatitudes. Blessed are the poor in spiri

entry.title: /int/ International: >Colombia boasts the highest bird species diversity in the world, with nearly 2,…
entry.content: >Colombia boasts the highest bird species diversity in the world, with nearly 2,000 recorded species representing almost 20% of all avian life on Earth. This unparalleled abundance is driven by the country's varied microclimates—ranging from Andean cloud forests to the Amazon—and isolation from historical geographic barriers. Why don't you visit Colombia and go birdwatching?

entry.content: >back in january >start talking to 36 y.o. lawyer on dating app >eventually agree to meet for coffee >she's very giggly and charming IRL >we chat for a while, the worst I do is mention an interest in mongolian history and wanting to learn horse archery >she's very educated and intelligent obviously >I walk her to her car, slightly lean in for a kiss, she slightly leans away >nothing too awkward though, didn't feel that hot wash of embarasment you get if you really fucked up >later she sends me a

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: In England, many towns and cities end with the suffix "-bury": which comes from …
entry.content: In England, many towns and cities end with the suffix "-bury": which comes from the Old English "burh", or "burg" meaning fortification or fortified settlement. The first of these Anglo-Saxon burhs were built in the 9th century on the orders of Alfred the Great, following the Viking invasion of the north of England. Many burhs were constructed upon pre-existing Roman fortifications, whilst some were constructed completely anew. His successors continued the construction of burhs and they played a

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Have you considered living without home internet and without a phone? I don't ow…
entry.content: Have you considered living without home internet and without a phone? I don't own a house, instead I own 2 apartments in the same building. 1 larger as a home and 1 smaller as an office. So in principle I could just cancel home internet and use the internet only for work or serious research in my office. Then I'd keep my home completely cut off from communication technology. No tv, no phone, no internet. This way I could focus more on reading books, expanding my mind and breaking free from my in

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Free work
entry.content: What kinda freework do you/would you like to do? I recently got into guerilla gardening magick mushrooms in my local parks. I make a few patches for myself and to give to friends, then i make public patches for strangers to find. Recently ive been trying to get familiar with native wildflowers and shrubs to plant around or near my mushroom patches to promote firefly & dragonfly habitat, and to also use their flowering stages as indicators for when my patches start fruiting. It pretty much cost m

entry.title: /g/ Technology: clock thread. functioning clocks are bloated garbage for iCucks. I've recently s…
entry.content: clock thread. functioning clocks are bloated garbage for iCucks. I've recently switched to broken clocks. broken clocks are always right twice a day, while functioning ones are always just a little bit off, meaning they're never right. this allowed me to debloat my time management and schedule aswell, since I only recognize 2 different times per day. I can also manually set the time, just like on a functioning clock, but without all the extra bloat of needing a power source and needing to make s

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Resident Evil 4 Remake
entry.content: Just beat this game, it was okay. I can tell why people liked it back in the 2000s. Some movement and controls felt clunky and i feel like there are difficulty spikes all over the place.
